purpose: Bounded minimization followed by 10 ps NVT and 10 ps NPT on CUDA mixed precision before the planned equilibration and 2 ns production pilot. This is a numerical stability smoke, not an equilibrium or sampling claim.

platform.name: CUDA
platform.device_note: NVIDIA RTX 4090; CUDA 12.9 runtime selected for compatibility with the host driver.

interpretation_boundary: Finite energy, temperature, volume, and CA RMSD values over 20 ps show only that the CUDA platform executes the short protocol without an immediate numerical failure. They do not establish equilibrium, force-field accuracy, or sufficient conformational sampling.
